Name: Human
HTML:
AncestryAct
Human
You were not born with magic or ancient lineage. You were born with will.
Once per Scene
You may take an Action to push through with sheer determination when a moment is stuck by making a Snap Check:
Press On — name what you're reaching for; take Boost 1 on your next check toward it
Find a Way — improvise an angle nobody else thought of; the GM names what opens
Rally — steady an ally beside you; they take Boost 1 on their next check
1–3 Fails·4–8 Choose 1·9+ Choose 2

Name: Elf
HTML:
AncestryAct
Elf
Something in you is older than this world, and it always notices.
Once per Scene
You may take an Action to attune to old memory or a hidden detail by making a Snap Check:
Listen — ask the GM one honest question about this Scene; they answer truthfully
Trace — name one detail others missed; the GM confirms if it's there
Stillness — read the room's weight; take Boost 1 on your next social check
1–3 Fails·4–8 Choose 1·9+ Choose 2

Name: Dwarf
HTML:
AncestryReact
Dwarf
You were carved from stone and stubbornness — and it shows.
Once per Scene
When a blow — physical, social, or emotional — would stagger you, React with a Snap Check:
Absorb It — take the hit and stay standing; narrate what you refuse to show
Dig In — anchor the beat; the Scene must work around you
Answer Back — a short, grounded reply that shifts the pressure
1–3 Fails·4–8 Choose 1·9+ Choose 2

Name: Halfling
HTML:
AncestryReact
Halfling
You've gotten away with things that should have ended you more times than you can count.
Once per Scene
When a bad roll would cost you in a tight moment, React with a Snap Check:
Slip Away — narrate how you duck the worst of it
Look Harmless — seem too small to bother; someone looks past you
Small Fortune — name one absurd lucky break; the GM plays it fairly
1–3 Fails·4–8 Choose 1·9+ Choose 2

Name: Half-Orc
HTML:
AncestryReact
Half-Orc
You have been underestimated your whole life. You have learned to use that.
Once per Scene
When the Scene pushes you to yield or fall, React with a Snap Check:
Stand — stay on your feet; narrate what keeps you there
Snarl — let your heritage show; one foe hesitates
Press — ride the refusal; take Boost 1 on your very next check
1–3 Fails·4–8 Choose 1·9+ Choose 2

Name: Tiefling
HTML:
AncestryAct
Tiefling
You carry something ancient and unholy in your blood. It is not a curse. It is yours.
Once per Scene
You may take an Action to bend a social beat with your unsettling heritage by making a Snap Check:
Shadow — your presence shifts the mood; name what changes
Bargain — offer a small infernal favor; the GM names the price
Whisper — speak one truth that shouldn't be known; one listener reacts honestly
1–3 Fails·4–8 Choose 1·9+ Choose 2

Name: Dragonborn
HTML:
AncestryAct
Dragonborn
Every choice you make is an answer to what your bloodline means.
Once per Scene
You may take an Action to let your draconic nature unsettle or awe by making a Snap Check:
Bearing — your stillness or voice changes the room's temperature
Ember — a small elemental tell; name it; the GM plays it fairly
Lineage — name what your blood remembers; ask one honest GM question
1–3 Fails·4–8 Choose 1·9+ Choose 2

Name: Gnome
HTML:
AncestryAct
Gnome
Your mind moves in directions that simply do not occur to anyone else.
Once per Scene
You may take an Action to find an odd angle or trick that could help by making a Snap Check:
Tinker — use something here in an unintended way; name how
Misdirect — draw eyes elsewhere; take Boost 1 on your next sneaky check
Spark — name the overlooked solution; the GM confirms if it could work
1–3 Fails·4–8 Choose 1·9+ Choose 2

Name: Half-Elf
HTML:
AncestryAct
Half-Elf
You belong to neither world completely. You have learned to make that a strength.
Once per Scene
You may take an Action to bridge two peoples or ways of seeing by making a Snap Check:
Translate — name the thread between two opposed parties; they hear you
Soften — ease tension with the right tone; one NPC shifts their stance
Switch — lean elven grace or human drive; take Boost 1 on your next check
1–3 Fails·4–8 Choose 1·9+ Choose 2

Name: Orc
HTML:
AncestryAct
Orc
You are built for things that require more than most people have.
Once per Scene
You may take an Action to bring raw force or presence to shift the moment by making a Snap Check:
Rush — close distance; name what gives way before you
Roar — your voice carries; one ally takes Boost 1 on their next Action
Break — name what cracks, splinters, or yields under your weight
1–3 Fails·4–8 Choose 1·9+ Choose 2
